ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laureates" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the laureate */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field of the Nobel Prize */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the laureate */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the laureate */,
  "country_of_birth" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of birth of the laureate */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the laureate */,
  "year_of_birth" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the laureate */,
  "age_of_nobel_win" INTEGER /* Age at the time of winning the Nobel Prize */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the laureate's image */,
  "dbpedia_link" TEXT /* Link to the laureate's DBpedia profile */,
  "wikipedia_link" TEXT /* Link to the laureate's Wikipedia profile */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the laureate */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the laureate */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place of death of the laureate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the laureate */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Current nationality of the laureate */,
  "photo_credit" TEXT /* Credit for the image */,
  "additional_links" TEXT /* Additional external links */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the laureate */,
  "awards_received" TEXT /* Other awards received by the laureate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureates_country_of_birth FOREIGN KEY ("country_of_birth") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureates_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the Nobel Prize field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the field */,
  "history" TEXT /* Brief history of the field */,
  "current_relevance" TEXT /* Current relevance of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university or institution */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the university is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the university or institution */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state of the university */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Global ranking of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_universities" (
  "laureate_university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "year_associated" INTEGER /* Year the laureate was associated with the university */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained by the laureate */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major subject of the laureate */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor subject of the laureate */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the laureate at the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_universities_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_universities_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "known_for" (
  "known_for_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the notable work or contribution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contribution */,
  "impact_statement" TEXT /* Statement on the impact of the contribution */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or sources for the contribution */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Names of collaborators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("known_for_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_known_for_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the Nobel Prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the Nobel Prize */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Names of other laureates sharing the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the image */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., DBpedia, Wikipedia) */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date the link was last checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the link (e.g., active, broken) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the laureate's work has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the laureate's work */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the citation or impact factor */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the citation (e.g., journal, conference) */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the cited article */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)
